banner.home: Add HiveIMR to your home screen for one-tap access on shift. Free, no signup. Patient identifiers stay encrypted at rest; AI generations are auditable per session.

firstVisit.body: Role-aware, AI-native medical records. Pick a role; HiveIMR shapes handoffs, summaries, and orders for the way you actually work.
